_notes.oboardApiToken: Shared Oboard API token (Settings > Integrations > API Tokens). Rotate periodically.
_notes.outputFolder: Leave as AUTO to auto-detect the synced SharePoint OKR library at '%USERPROFILE%\Sophos Ltd\Office of Strategic Programs (OSP) - OKR'. Or set an explicit local path. Sync the library first via SharePoint > Sync / Add shortcut to OneDrive.
_notes.port: Local port the app listens on (http://localhost:<port>).
